themeWords.meaning: Moab; descendants of Lot and their land east of the Dead Sea

sentenceTheme: A lament over Moab’s devastation with a plea for refuge, and a promise of a righteous throne established in mercy and truth.

verses.text: Send ye the lamb to the ruler of the land from Sela to the wilderness, unto the mount of the daughter of Zion.
For it shall be, that, as a wandering bird cast out of the nest, so the daughters of Moab shall be at the fords of Arnon.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; descendants of Lot and their land
Arnon; a river forming Moab’s boundary

verses.text: Take counsel, execute judgment; make thy shadow as the night in the midst of the noonday; hide the outcasts; bewray not him that wandereth.
Let mine outcasts dwell with thee, Moab; be thou a covert to them from the face of the spoiler: for the extortioner is at an end, the spoiler ceaseth, the oppressors are consumed out of the land.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; descendants of Lot and their land

verses.text: And in mercy shall the throne be established: and he shall sit upon it in truth in the tabernacle of David, judging, and seeking judgment, and hasting righteousness.
We have heard of the pride of Moab; he is very proud: even of his haughtiness, and his pride, and his wrath: but his lies shall not be so.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; descendants of Lot and their land

verses.text: Therefore shall Moab howl for Moab, every one shall howl: for the foundations of Kir-hareseth shall ye mourn; surely they are stricken.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; descendants of Lot and their land

verses.text: For the fields of Heshbon languish, and the vine of Sibmah: the lords of the heathen have broken down the principal plants thereof: they are come even unto Jazer, they wandered through the wilderness: her branches are stretched out, they are gone over the sea.
Therefore I will bewail with the weeping of Jazer the vine of Sibmah: I will water thee with my tears, O Heshbon, and Elealeh: for the shouting for thy summer fruits and for thy harvest is fallen.

And gladness is taken away, and joy out of the plentiful field; and in the vineyards there shall be no singing, neither shall there be shouting: the treaders shall tread out no wine in their presses; I have made their vintage shouting to cease.
Wherefore my bowels shall sound like an harp for Moab, and mine inward parts for Kir-haresh.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; descendants of Lot and their land

verses.text: And it shall come to pass, when it is seen that Moab is weary on the high place, that he shall come to his sanctuary to pray; but he shall not prevail.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; descendants of Lot and their land

verses.text: This is the word that the LORD hath spoken concerning Moab since that time.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of Israel’s God, Yahweh

verses.text: But now the LORD hath spoken, saying, Within three years, as the years of an hireling, and the glory of Moab shall be contemned, with all that great multitude; and the remnant shall be very small and feeble.
